The '''Council of Merchants''' was associated with the governance of [[Carida/Legends|Carida]]. Prior to the destruction of [[Carida/Legends|Carida]] in [[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]],<ref name="CotF">''[[Champions of the Force]]''</ref> the Council co-governed Carida alongside a Military administration.<ref name="Wizards" />
